title: NEHU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: NEHU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: North-Eastern Hill University Result 2026 released for MTech BME 4th Semester August 2025, BTech BME 3rd Semester 2024 Batch and BTech ECE 1st Semester Regular and Reappear exams held in December 2025 on the official website - nehu.ac.in on 30-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the NEHU result.

content.text: North-Eastern Hill University has published the NEHU Result 2026 for several UG and PG engineering examinations conducted in August and December 2025. The latest update includes the Final Result of MTech BME 4th Semester (Regular) 2023 batch held in August 2025, Result of BTech BME 3rd Semester (Regular) 2024 Batch held in December 2025, Result of BTech ECE 1st Semester (Regular) 2025 Batch held in December 2025 and Result of BTech ECE 1st Semester (Reappear) 2024 Batch held in December 2025. NEHU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website nehu.ac.in via the dedicated results server at exams.nehu.ac.in.

Students can check and download their result PDFs by opening the respective links and searching their roll number in the published lists, or by using the PG/UG result portal where applicable. After accessing the result, candidates should carefully verify their name, roll number, batch, course, semester, subject wise marks and overall pass/fail status and contact the university examination branch or their department in case of any discrepancy.

The latest NEHU engineering result announcement covers both postgraduate MTech Biotechnology & Medical Engineering (BME) and undergraduate BTech BME and ECE programmes, across different batches and semesters. These results are part of the 2025-26 academic cycle and are especially important for final semester MTech students and first year BTech students.

NEHU hosts detailed course wise results as PDF files on its exam server, with each link corresponding to a specific course, batch and semester. Students can open the required PDF directly or start from the central PG/UG results page for other programmes.

links.label: Final Result of MTech BME 4th Semester (Regular) 2023 Batch held in August 2025
Result of BTech BME 3rd Semester (Regular) 2024 Batch held in December 2025
Result of BTech ECE 1st Semester (Regular) 2025 Batch held in December 2025
Result of BTech ECE 1st Semester (Reappear) 2024 Batch held in December 2025
NEHU PG/UG Results Portal – All Latest Results 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your NEHU MTech BME or BTech BME/ECE Result 2026:

items: Choose the appropriate result link from the table above or open the central portal: http://exams.nehu.ac.in/PGresults.
If using a direct link, allow the PDF to load in your browser; if using the PGresults portal, locate your course and semester link first and click on it.
Inside the PDF, press Ctrl+F and type your Roll Number / Exam Number / Name as per your admit card to find your record quickly.
Check your course, batch, semester, subject wise marks or grade points (if shown) and overall result status (Pass/Fail/Backlog).
Download or print the PDF for your academic file, scholarship, training, internship or higher education applications.
For final semester MTech BME students, preserve the final result copy carefully as proof of programme completion until official consolidated mark sheets and degree certificates are issued.
